assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains ForwardedHeaders configuration with XForwardedFor and XForwardedProto
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 'Behind a Reverse Proxy' shows ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedFor | ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedProto

assertions.assertion: Program.cs restricts KnownProxies to the proxy IP address 10.0.0.1 and does not accept forwarded headers from any source
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 shows options.KnownProxies.Add(IPAddress.Parse('10.0.0.1')) and Common Pitfall #4 warns against accepting from any source

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures HSTS with MaxAge of at least 365 days and IncludeSubDomains = true
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 shows options.MaxAge = TimeSpan.FromDays(365) and options.IncludeSubDomains = true

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls UseForwardedHeaders() before UseHttpsRedirection() and UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 1 shows UseForwardedHeaders() as 'Must be the very first middleware' before UseHttpsRedirection and UseIdentityServer

assertions.assertion: Program.cs uses StatusCodes.Status308PermanentRedirect or equivalent 308 status code for HTTPS redirection
